headline: Cybersecurity ETFs Face a Reckoning: Which 3 Will Weather the Downturn
summary: Ransomware payouts, supply‑chain breaches, and state‑backed attacks have pushed cybersecurity spending into the category of must‑have corporate expenses rather than optional upgrades. For investors who want exposure to the security budgets that swell after every major breach, thematic ETFs offer a cleaner entry point than trying to pick winners in an industry where market share ...
